# Contact

Thank you for visiting my portfolio.

I am always interested in discussing research opportunities, graduate studies, data science projects, clinical research, and professional collaborations.

## Contact Information

**Email**  
[davidaballester@gmail.com](mailto:davidaballester@gmail.com)

**LinkedIn**  
https://www.linkedin.com/in/davidaballester/

**Location**  
Fullerton, California

## Areas of Interest

- Clinical Research
- Biostatistics
- Data Science
- Machine Learning
- Statistical Modeling
- Health Analytics

I look forward to connecting with researchers, employers, and fellow students who share similar interests.
